name: Zucchini Bread- Pan-1
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all dry ingredients (bread flour, dry milk, salt, cinnamon, ground cloves, and walnuts) in the bread pan.
2. Add butter to the mixture and stir until well combined.
3. Grate 3 tbsp of zucchini into a measuring cup.
4. Measure out 3/4 cup of water and add it to the zucchini mixture.
5. Dissolve 1 tsp of dry yeast in the water.
6. Pour the liquid ingredients (zucchini, water, and dissolved yeast) over the dry ingredients in the bread pan.
7. Close the cover and place the yeast holder on top of the bread pan.
8. Press start to begin baking using Rapid mode.
